description.value:
A small portable shrine, containing a sacred object or the remains of a saint or some other aspect of divinity, infused with holy power - or so you claim.

This is used as the material component for the @UUID[Compendium.elkan5e.elkan5e-spells.Item.zKJ6ia0SOCrIEGQn]{Holy Aura} spell, which cannot be cast unless this component is carried by the caster.

This component can be used for the casting of the Holy Aura spell as many times as you like.
